prose:
Frontier-orbital gap (HOMO–LUMO)
Method provenance (property, level, geometry, environment, etc.):
• Property: Kohn–Sham HOMO and LUMO orbital energies and their gap (eV).
• Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` ≡ B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI (density-fitting) in PySCF  (backend reported in JSON).
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied structure file “/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz”; single-point calculation — geometry not re-optimized at DFT (notation: DFT//input-xyz).
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model invoked).
• Charge = 0 Multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet; RHF/RKS reference).
• Software: PySCF (via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill; cli shown below).
• SCF convergence: converged in 7 cycles; no warnings were reported.

Headline numerical result
HOMO = −8.603 718 3 eV
LUMO =  +0.336 950 37 eV
HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.940 668 7 eV

Reproducibility
CLI invocation recorded by chemkit (see JSON field `cli_invocation`):
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpalk3b2xz/live.json
A live engine log was written during the run (path was displayed when the job launched; please `tail -f` that .out file for full SCF details). The JSON result is stored at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpalk3b2xz/live.json.

No warnings were emitted by the engine (result JSON `warnings` array was empty; SCF converged: true).
